title: Admin swords
description: This mod adds incredibly op swords into the game, all with custom and unique abilities.
body: This mod adds swords, op swords and/or fun swords to play around with. For the casual user who wants to abuse some broken powers. For instance, if you hit someone with one of the swords they will be put in a half-dead, half-life state where they can't do anything and is extremely difficult to kill.
